 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before=0A# t=
 his line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may=0A# creat=
 e directories; files and directories will be owned by you and=0A# have defa=
 ult permissions.=0A#=0A# This archive contains:=0A#=0A#	/usr/ports/net/ftel=
 netd/=0A#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile=0A#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-=
 descr=0A#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo=0A#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-=
 plist=0A#=0Aecho c - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/=0Amkdir -p /usr/ports/net/fte=
 lnetd/ > /dev/null 2>&1=0Aecho x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile=0Ased '=
 s/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnet=
 d/Makefile'=0AX# New ports collection makefile for:	ftelnetd=0AX# Date crea=
 ted:        11 March 2007=0AX# Whom:                miwi=0AX#=0AX# $FreeBSD=
 $=0AX=0AXPORTNAME=3D		ftelnetd=0AXPORTVERSION=3D	0.0.2=0AXCATEGORIES=3D		ne=
 t=0AXMASTER_SITES=3D	http://www.corehack.org/codes/=0AX=0AXMAINTAINER=3D		m=
 iwi@FreeBSD.org=0AXCOMMENT=3D			A small server faking various telnet daemon=
 s=0AX=0AXUSE_GMAKE=3D		YES=0AX=0AX.include <bsd.port.mk>=0AEND-of-/usr/port=
 s/net/ftelnetd/Makefile=0Aecho x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr=0Ased =
 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/fteln=
 etd/pkg-descr'=0AXfake telnet daemon (ftelnetd)=0AX------------------------=
 -----=0AXftelnetd is a small server faking various telnet daemons,=0AXloggi=
 ng all received logins to a file and doing more actions.=0AX=0AXWWW: http:/=
 /www.corehack.org/=0AEND-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr=0Aecho x - /u=
 sr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo=0Ased 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/dist=
 info << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo'=0AXMD5 (ftelnetd-0.0.2.ta=
 r.gz) =3D 9893a75b91aa1651e85a5f73318f6ef7=0AXSHA256 (ftelnetd-0.0.2.tar.gz=
 ) =3D eedd27aff910e3b3129a128ba2c0ce673c45163bd9b3c98888b3428067d75d98=0AXS=
 IZE (ftelnetd-0.0.2.tar.gz) =3D 8166=0AEND-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/disti=
 nfo=0Aecho x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist=0Ased 's/^X//' >/usr/ports=
 /net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist'=0AXsb=
 in/ftelnetd=0AEND-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist=0Aexit=0A=0A
 --cWoXeonUoKmBZSoM--
